_comment: Project-scoped settings shipped with the evolve-loop plugin. Three PreToolUse hooks enforce structural trust boundaries: (1) ship-gate.sh on Bash — only scripts/lifecycle/ship.sh can perform ship-class git/gh ops (v8.13.0). (2) phase-gate-precondition.sh on Bash — subagent-run.sh invocations must follow Scout→Builder→Auditor sequence (v8.13.1). (3) role-gate.sh on Edit|Write — files can only be modified by the active phase's agent within its allowlisted paths (v8.13.1). All three gates honor an emergency bypass env var; routine bypassing is a CLAUDE.md violation. v8.13.3 adds a PostToolUse hook on Edit|Write that syntax-checks the modified file by extension (.json → jq empty, .sh → bash -n, .py → python3 -m py_compile); never blocks (PostToolUse can't), only emits WARN to LLM stderr. v10.16.0 adds research-quota-gate.sh on WebSearch|WebFetch|Bash — counts research-tool calls per agent and denies over-quota invocations (Cycle A of research-as-tool plan). v10.17.0 (cycle-90) adds doc-deletion-guard.sh on Bash — blocks rm/mv targeting docs/** or knowledge-base/** without canonical archival mv; operator escape: EVOLVE_ALLOW_DOC_DELETE=1.
